sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n61610" key="laqrimai=os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λαθρ-ῐμαῖος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n61610.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">λάθριος</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:117:26" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">117.26</biblScope></bibl>, Hsch.s.v.<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σκότιον</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
